CommunityApplications.Profile:
Self-hosted reading tools by **felixapel**.
**CWA eBook Translate** provides bilingual reading for [Calibre-Web-Automated](https://github.com/crocodilestick/Calibre-Web-Automated). Translate ebooks paragraph-by-paragraph *while you read*, in 100+ languages, using your own local LLM (Ollama / vLLM / LM Studio) or any major cloud API. The old install template is temporarily quarantined while the exact v2.2.1 image digest and replacement XML complete physical Unraid and Community Applications validation. Do not install an archived copy that uses `latest`.
**Support:** bugs → [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/felixapel/CWA-eBook-Translate-Plugin/issues), questions → [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/felixapel/CWA-eBook-Translate-Plugin/discussions), private contact → felixguillermoapel@gmail.com.
CommunityApplications.DonateText: If this plugin saved you a translation subscription, consider supporting development
